title: Set of 6 Plastic Wine Glasses Plastic Reusable Drinking Glasses Goblets Perfect for Indoor & Outdoor Dining Parties & BBQs
features: Set of 6 Coloured plastic wine goblets.
The set of 6 goblets features a classy wave design with a white interior.
Material: Made of high-quality two tone effect plastic which is both strong and durable making them long lasting goblets.
The goblets come is 6 eye catching colours, which you will receive one of each colour as a set. Orange, blue, green, red, yellow and purple.

Shatter proof plastic goblets can be used safely by all family and friends without having to worry about breakages and damage. This makes them perfect for indoor and outdoor use including BBQs, picnics, outdoor dining and much more.
Generously sized, the goblets have a capacity of 300ml with the goblet itself measuring 19.5cm x 8cm approx.
description: Product Description Elevate your dining experience with this vibrant set of 6 two-tone coloured plastic wine goblets, offering a perfect blend of style and functionality. This set includes six goblets in a spectrum of eye-catching hues: red, orange, yellow, green, blue, and purple. Each goblet boasts a two-tone design, adding a playful touch to your table setting. With their classic goblet shape and sleek silhouette, these plastic wine glasses exude elegance and sophistication. The two-tone color scheme adds a modern twist, making them a stylish addition to any table setting. Each goblet has a capacity of 300ml, allowing you to enjoy your favorite wines, cocktails, or beverages with ease. Whether you're sipping on a crisp white wine or a refreshing sangria, these goblets offer ample space for your drink of choice. Crafted from high-quality plastic, these wine goblets are durable and shatterproof, making them ideal for both indoor and outdoor use. Whether you're hosting a dinner party or enjoying a picnic in the park, these goblets are sure to withstand the rigors of everyday use.
